title: Claim status call captures denied outcome
success_criteria: The assistant keeps the conversation focused on claim CLAIM-EXAMPLE-DENIED.
The assistant confirms the payer reports the claim as denied.
The assistant captures the denial reason and payer reference.
The assistant avoids promising an appeal or resolution not provided by the payer.

criteria: The transcript reaches a denied-status outcome for CLAIM-EXAMPLE-DENIED.
The assistant confirms that denial is the payer-reported outcome.
The assistant captures denial reason INFO-MISSING and reference REF-DENIED-BRAVO.
The assistant does not request unnecessary patient details.
The assistant does not promise that the denial will be overturned.
The assistant recovers after the representative interrupts the opening.
The assistant restates the claim reference clearly after interruption.
The assistant summarizes denied status, reason, and reference.
The assistant closes the call after capturing required denial details.

notes: Synthetic denied-claim fixture. No real payer or patient data.

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: Hello, this is Chris calling from Cosentus about claim CLAIM-EXAMPLE-DENIED. I am checking claim status.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.content: That claim is denied for reason INFO-MISSING. The payer reference is REF-DENIED-BRAVO.

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: Thank you. I have CLAIM-EXAMPLE-DENIED as denied for INFO-MISSING with reference REF-DENIED-BRAVO.
